query:
INSERT INTO providerHealth (provider, successCount, failureCount, consecutiveFailures, totalSpendUsd, wastedSpendUsd, avgRenderTimeMs, isHealthy, providerMode) VALUES
('atlas-cloud', 0, 0, 0, '0', '0', 0, true, 'probe-only'),
('wavespeed', 0, 0, 0, '0', '0', 0, true, 'full'),
('kling', 0, 0, 0, '0', '0', 0, true, 'full'),
('runway', 0, 0, 0, '0', '0', 0, true, 'full'),
('heygen', 0, 0, 0, '0', '0', 0, true, 'full')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE providerMode = VALUES(providerMode);
